creator: oleglelchuk@gmail.com
text:
When the tab button gets me to this point:

du -cah file.\(mine\).

I won't be able to use the tab button to see the list of files that are available for auto-completion. If I add 1 to this myself:

du -cah file.\(mine\).1

then the tab button still won't allow me to autocomplete further. Is this really how a "usable interactive" shell supposed to behave?
